positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed mystical botanical illustration featuring trailing moonflowers, delicate fern fronds, and stylized celestial elements (crescent moon and constellations). The style must mimic vintage scientific etching and linocut engraving, utilizing intricate, bold black linework with high contrast. The composition should be centrally focused, clean, and isolated on a solid, neutral background, suitable for printing on apparel. Use a limited, earthy color palette with deep indigo accents. The overall aesthetic is elegant, mystical, and bohemian, emphasizing strong silhouettes and graphic quality.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, poor anatomy, multiple subjects, messy, low detail, bad composition
